stories.headline: Six months since coming out Mitch Brown believes the AFL will do better
stories.first_sentence: Three months after ex-AFL player, Mitch Brown, made the historic decision to come out as bisexual he was bailed up by a media staffer at a Lady Gaga concert.

stories.headline: Sussan Ley won't return to parliament for farewell but is 'proud' of leadership milestone
stories.first_sentence: SBS acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country and their connections and continuous care for the skies, lands and waterways throughout Australia.

stories.headline: Why these Sydney beaches have been named Australia's best
stories.first_sentence: Bate Bay beaches in Sydney's Sutherland Shire have taken out the top spot in Tourism Australia's annual best beaches list.
